DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IRON MAN MOVING, LLC SHALL SERVE FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1 BY NO LATER THAN JUNE 24, 2016. DEFENDANT'S RESPONSES WERE EVASIVE, INCOMPLETE, AND/OR NON-RESPONSIVE. AS TO THE SUBPARTS OF FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1 THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT ANSWER, ALL OBJECTIONS TO THOSE SUBPARTS ARE WAIVED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CONOR MOORE; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES is granted. Defendant Iron Man Moving, LLC shall serve further verified responses to Form Interrogatory 15.1 by no later than June 24, 2016. Defendant's responses were evasive, incomplete, and/or non-responsive. As to the subparts of Form Interrogatory 15.1 that Defendant did not answer, all objections to those subparts are waived. Judge Pro Tem: Conor Moore; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEVEN D. CRIBB, ESQ. of Northern California Collection Service, Inc., Tel No. 916-929-0130 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ANNE E. SMIDDY, ESQ. of Ad Astra Law Group, LLP, Tel No. 415-795-3579 appearing for the Defendant Iron Man Moving, LLC.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling, and orders as follows: DEFENDANT IRON MAN MOVING, LLC'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment is granted. Defendant has shown that it is entitled to have the default judgment set aside per CCP 473(d) because the default judgment is void due to service of process not having been accomplished on it. Additionally, the court grants Defendant Iron Man Moving, LLC's motion to set aside the default. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
